label: SerpAPI
description: Fetch scraped search engine results from Google, Bing, Yahoo, Baidu, and more via the SerpAPI service.

form.title: Connect SerpAPI
form.subtitle: Paste your SerpAPI key to start pulling live search engine results.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your SerpAPI key — found in your dashboard under API Key. Takes 30 seconds and works for all supported search engines.
methods.how_to:
## Get your SerpAPI key

1. Log in (or sign up) at [serpapi.com](https://serpapi.com).
2. Click your avatar or go to **Dashboard** in the top navigation.
3. Select **API Key** in the left sidebar (or visit [serpapi.com/manage-api-key](https://serpapi.com/manage-api-key) directly).
4. Copy the key shown in the **Your Private API Key** box.
5. Paste it into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- The free plan includes 100 searches/month. Paid plans unlock higher quotas and additional engines.
- Your key grants full access to your account quota — treat it like a password and don't share it.
- If you suspect exposure, regenerate the key from the same dashboard page; update the value in Anton afterward.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at serpapi.com → Dashboard → API Key. Kept encrypted on your device.

fields.name: default_engine
fields.label: Default Search Engine
fields.description: The engine Anton uses when no engine is specified in a request.

fields.name: default_location
fields.label: Default Location
fields.description: Optional. Geo-target results to a city, region, or country. Leave blank for global results.
